meta.summary: ByteDance officially launched Seed 2.0 and separately exposed Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview on Arena, marking a concrete new foundation-model release from one of China’s largest AI investors. Google also shipped AI Edge Gallery, an official mobile app for running Gemma 4 and Gemma 3-family models on-device, while AgentScope 1.0 emerged as a notable agent framework release aimed at large-scale multi-agent simulation and production agentic applications.

items.title: AgentScope 1.0: A Developer-Centric Framework for Building Agentic Applications
items.summary_short: AgentScope 1.0 is a developer-focused framework for building agentic applications. It provides infrastructure for combining LLM reasoning with tool use in real-world workflows

topic_refs.headline: AgentScope 1.0 Releases as a Developer Framework for Agentic Applications

items.spotlight_comment: Driven by rapid advancements of Large Language Models (LLMs), agents are empowered to combine intrinsic knowledge with dynamic tool use, greatly enhancing their capacity to address real-world tasks.

items.title: Efficient Memory Management for Large Language Model Serving with PagedAttention
items.summary_short: This paper presents PagedAttention, a memory-management approach for serving large language models more efficiently. It focuses on improving throughput by handling KV-cache memory more effectively during batched inference

topic_refs.headline: Efficient Memory Management for Large Language Model Serving with PagedAttention

items.spotlight_comment: High throughput serving of large language models (LLMs) requires batching sufficiently many requests at a time.

topic_refs.headline: AgentScope 1.0 Releases as a Developer Framework for Agentic Applications

items.spotlight_comment: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have opened new avenues for applying multi-agent systems in very large-scale simulations.

items.title: Aligning Progress and Feasibility: A Neuro-Symbolic Dual Memory Framework for Long-Horizon LLM Agents
items.summary_short: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong potential in long-horizon decision-making tasks, such as embodied manipulation and web interaction. However, agents frequently struggle with endless trial-and-error loops or deviate from the main objective in complex environments.
tags: Memory Structures and Agent Memory Systems

topic_refs.headline: Aligning Progress and Feasibility: A Neuro-Symbolic Dual Memory Framework for Long-Horizon LLM Agents

items.title: The AI Scientist-v2: Workshop-Level Automated Scientific Discovery via Agentic Tree Search
items.summary_short: The AI Scientist-v2 is an agentic system for automated scientific discovery using tree search. The paper claims the system can produce workshop-level scientific outputs end to end

topic_refs.headline: The AI Scientist-v2: Workshop-Level Automated Scientific Discovery via Agentic Tree Search

items.spotlight_comment: AI is increasingly playing a pivotal role in transforming how scientific discoveries are made. We introduce The AI Scientist-v2, an end-to-end agentic system capable of producing the first entirely AI generated peer-review-accepted workshop paper.

items.title: Finding Belief Geometries with Sparse Autoencoders
items.summary_short: Understanding the geometric structure of internal representations is a central goal of mechanistic interpretability.

topic_refs.headline: Finding Belief Geometries with Sparse Autoencoders

items.title: Prism: Policy Reuse via Interpretable Strategy Mapping in Reinforcement Learning
items.summary_short: We present PRISM (Policy Reuse via Interpretable Strategy Mapping), a framework that grounds reinforcement learning agents' decisions in discrete, causally validated concepts and uses those concepts as a zero-shot transfer interface between agents trained with different algorithms.
tags: World Models, Exploration, and Open-Ended Reinforcement Learning

topic_refs.headline: Prism: Policy Reuse via Interpretable Strategy Mapping in Reinforcement Learning

items.title: Opal: Private Memory for Personal AI
items.summary_short: Personal AI systems increasingly retain long-term memory of user activity, including documents, emails, messages, meetings, and ambient recordings. Trusted hardware can keep this data private, but struggles to scale with a growing datastore.
tags: Memory Structures and Agent Memory Systems

topic_refs.headline: Opal: Private Memory for Personal AI

items.title: Learning the Signature of Memorization in Autoregressive Language Models
items.summary_short: All prior membership inference attacks for fine-tuned language models use hand-crafted heuristics (e.g., loss thresholding, Min-K\%, reference calibration), each bounded by the designer's intuition.

topic_refs.headline: Learning the Signature of Memorization in Autoregressive Language Models

items.title: VibeVoice Technical Report
items.summary_short: This report presents VibeVoice, a novel model designed to synthesize long-form speech with multiple speakers by employing next-token diffusion, which is a unified method for modeling continuous data by autoregressively generating latent vectors via diffusion.
items.spotlight_comment: This report presents VibeVoice, a novel model designed to synthesize long-form speech with multiple speakers by employing next-token diffusion, which is a unified method for modeling continuous data by autoregressively generating latent vectors via

items.title: PaddleOCR-VL: Boosting Multilingual Document Parsing via a 0.9B Ultra-Compact Vision-Language Model
items.summary_short: In this report, we propose PaddleOCR-VL, a SOTA and resource-efficient model tailored for document parsing.
items.spotlight_comment: In this report, we propose PaddleOCR-VL, a SOTA and resource-efficient model tailored for document parsing.

items.title: Generative World Renderer
items.summary_short: Scaling generative inverse and forward rendering to real-world scenarios is bottlenecked by the limited realism and temporal coherence of existing synthetic datasets. To bridge this persistent domain gap, we introduce a large-scale, dynamic dataset curated from visually complex AAA games.
items.spotlight_comment: Scaling generative inverse and forward rendering to real-world scenarios is bottlenecked by the limited realism and temporal coherence of existing synthetic datasets.

featured_topics.headline: ByteDance Ships Seed 2.0 and Opens Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview on Arena
featured_topics.summary_short: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0. The announcement marks the formal release of the company's new-generation foundation model
featured_topics.why_it_matters: ByteDance’s official model launch is a tangible signal of continued frontier-model investment from a hyperscale consumer platform with the capital and distribution to matter.
key_takeaways: ByteDance Seed formally announced Seed 2.0 as its new-generation foundation model in an official company release.
The company also made Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview available on Arena, giving the market an early public evaluation path rather than a purely closed announcement.
The same announcement stream included ByteDance Seed’s 2027 foundation-model campus recruiting push, indicating the release is paired with ongoing talent expansion rather than a one-off demo.

evidence.title: ByteDance Seed 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment Opens
Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview Released on Arena

featured_topics.headline: AgentScope 1.0 Releases as a Developer Framework for Agentic Applications
featured_topics.summary_short: AgentScope 1.0 is a developer-focused framework for building agentic applications. It provides infrastructure for combining LLM reasoning with tool use in real-world workflows
featured_topics.why_it_matters: Agent infrastructure is becoming a strategic layer, and AgentScope 1.0 targets teams building multi-agent systems that need scalability beyond prototype orchestration.
key_takeaways: AgentScope 1.0 is positioned as a developer-centric framework for building agentic applications, not just a research demo for isolated benchmarks.
Associated work on 'Very Large-Scale Multi-Agent Simulation in AgentScope' highlights scalability and efficiency as core design goals, addressing bottlenecks in existing multi-agent platforms.
The framework explicitly targets agents that combine LLM reasoning with dynamic tool use, aligning with the current enterprise shift from chat interfaces to workflow-executing systems.

evidence.title: Very Large-Scale Multi-Agent Simulation in AgentScope
AgentScope 1.0: A Developer-Centric Framework for Building Agentic Applications

featured_topics.headline: Google Launches AI Edge Gallery for On-Device Gemma 4 and Gemma 3 Models
featured_topics.summary_short: Google AI Edge Gallery is an official Google app highlighted for running AI models on-device. The post describes it as a mobile app available through Apple's App Store
featured_topics.why_it_matters: Google is productizing local inference on consumer devices, which matters for privacy-sensitive deployments, lower serving costs, and broader adoption of Gemma as an edge AI stack.
key_takeaways: AI Edge Gallery is Google’s official app for running Gemma models directly on phones, according to the cited App Store listing and analysis.
The app supports Gemma 4 E2B and E4B variants, plus selected Gemma 3-family models, making it a concrete distribution channel for Google’s open model line.
The release shifts Gemma from a model family developers download manually to a packaged end-user experience, which could accelerate experimentation with offline and low-latency AI use cases.

evidence.title: Google AI Edge Gallery

x_buzz.title: Google AI Edge Gallery
x_buzz.summary:
Google AI Edge Gallery

Terrible name, really great app: this is Google's official app for running their Gemma 4 models (the E2B and E4B sizes, plus some members of the Gemma 3 family) directly on your iPhone.

It works really well. The E2B model is a 2.54GB download and is both fast and genuinely useful.

The app also provides "ask questions about images" and audio transcription (up to 30s) with the two small Gemma 4 models, and has an interesting "skills" demo which demonstrates tool calling against eight different interactive widgets, each implemented as an HTML page (though sadly the source code is not visible): interactive-map, kitchen-adventure, calculate-has...
x_buzz.linked_topic: Google Launches AI Edge Gallery for On-Device Gemma 4 and Gemma 3 Models

x_buzz.title: ByteDance Seed 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment Opens
x_buzz.summary: ByteDance Seed announced that its 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment program is now open, including internship opportunities. This is a company recruitment announcement for students interested in joining the foundation model team.
x_buzz.linked_topic: ByteDance Ships Seed 2.0 and Opens Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview on Arena

x_buzz.title: Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview Released on Arena
x_buzz.summary: ByteDance Seed announced the release of Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview on Arena. The post indicates a preview availability of the model for public evaluation or testing.
x_buzz.linked_topic: ByteDance Ships Seed 2.0 and Opens Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview on Arena
